title: FLASHBACK — cafe conversation, getting to know each other
prompt: Medium two-shot at the marble cafe table inside the warm-wood European cafe, brass pendants overhead, two coffee cups between them. @young_Papa sitting across from @young_Mama, both leaning slightly forward in animated conversation. Mouth LAUGHS happily, head TIPS BACK in laughter. Hands GESTURE warmly. young_Papa (laughing): "...and then I got on the WRONG train!" young_Mama (laughing back, hand covers mouth): "No way!" Soft afternoon light through the window, autumn leaves visible outside.
